opportunities.title: [hiring] male - american - 18-30YO - 4$/minute - $120 total
opportunities.description:
[hiring] male - american - 18-30YO - 4$/minute - $120 total

Hi, I need an energetic American male 18-30YO to create a couple of looms. You need to have a decent background/office setup (if possible). You must be wearing clean/casual clothes. You will be paid a flat 20$ for any looms under 5 minutes. If a loom is longer than 5 minutes, it will be 4$/minute. At the moment I need around 30 minutes of recordings. You will be showing your face, sharing your screen and going through my software for a demo. I myself will create looms with the exact steps to do/things to say, just need to replicate.
